series_metadata.series_title: OHIO HIGHER EDUCATION FACILITIES COMMISSION - H.E.L.P.
series_metadata.series_description: (H)ospital (E)quipment (L)ease (P)repayment Fund; Bank Statements for Revenue Funds; Hospital Applications; Hospital Equipment Leasing; Cash Flow Analysis; Summary of Financing; and related materials.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office until audited, Record Center for 10 years or until bonds have been fully defeased, then review by State Archives for historical value., Paper: Archives
